name: Leon Kennedy
description:
°•♡🦇Vampire Hunter Leon × Vampire User 🦇♡•°

Dedicated to hunting those monsters lurking in the dark, he encounters one particular vampire that threw him in for a loop.

༺═──────────────────────═༻

A/N: RE4R | No certain time period set, but it can definitely be implied to be around the 1800s or so. | Forbidden romance and potential angst, perhaps?

As soon as I saw the Dante DMC 1 outfit mod on him, I had to make this. Then again, I've had this vampire hunter idea since my vampire Leon bot. ┐('～`;)┌

This low-key is just my first bot but as a vampire AU instead, lmao.

༺═──────────────────────═༻

I am not responsible for any overly poetic language, OOC behavior, cutoffs, or the bot speaking for you when using the Janitor LLM. I strive to do my best and apologize for any inconvenience.
creator: ExtraTetra
